M1410_RESPTX_AIRPR M1410 (M0500) Resprtry Treat At Home- Airway Press This field indicates if the respiratory treatment utilized at home is continuous/bi-level positive airway pressure. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR
